text:
Market today: The market mood is cautious, driven by ongoing Fed uncertainty around inflation and specific negative news within the tech sector (OpenAI security, Reddit deal concerns). This directly impacts your tech/chip heavy book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-35.71%) and SPAL (-49.86%) are your biggest concerns. Both are leveraged ETFs prone to decay, and margin amplifies these deep losses. QQQI (-3.22%) is also flagged for trimming and is near its stop.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions for further downside. Monitor broader tech sentiment, especially around AI news, and any new Fed signals about rates.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your leveraged holdings and stay defensive in tech amidst macro uncertainty.
plays: SOXL is at SELL status with a -35.71% loss; consider a significant trim or exit due to its leveraged decay and margin risk.
SPAL shows a -49.86% loss; review this leveraged ETF for potential reduction given its volatility and decay.
QQQI is at TRIM status and near its 52 stop; consider reducing size if it breaches that level.
